overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City. The journey begins in a covered pedestrian walkway with digital billboards, transitions through urban streets and plazas with futuristic neon-lit architecture, and ends in a dark narrow alley. The scene features persistent artificial lighting, modern glass buildings, and sparse pedestrian traffic throughout the night setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway following a companion pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: companion pedestrian walking ahead at steady pace through the corridor

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying product commercials along the left wall
exposed ventilation pipes and lighting fixtures running along the ceiling
wide pedestrian walkway with smooth concrete surface and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with large digital billboards displaying advertisements on the left. The ceiling features exposed industrial pipes and fluorescent lighting. Following another pedestrian ahead through the concrete corridor with no visible sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: exits covered walkway into open urban street with visible sky and traffic
crossing the street alongside pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating the street crossing while moving toward the MARQUESS building on the left

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: large commercial building with illuminated MARQUESS and DELAMAIN signage on the facade
asphalt street surface with crosswalk markings and traffic barriers
tall modern street lamps illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into an open urban intersection at night. The MARQUESS building with bright illuminated signage dominates the left side of the street. Crossing the asphalt road alongside other pedestrians while a black SUV waits at the traffic barrier. The environment shifts from enclosed artificial lighting to open mixed lighting with visible sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with modern landscaping

events.description: ascending a flight of concrete stairs leading to an upper level entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and ascending a wide concrete staircase toward a building entrance

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and purple neon interior lighting
large rectangular concrete planters containing palm trees lining the walkway
wide staircase with gray concrete steps leading upward between modern buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open pedestrian plaza featuring modern glass towers with purple neon lighting and large planters with palm trees. The area has tiled paving and contemporary urban design. Approaching and ascending a wide concrete staircase that leads to an upper level entrance between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between high-rise buildings

events.description: entering a dark narrow alleyway with industrial elements and red neon lighting
exiting the dark alley back into an open area with visible buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow dark alleyway with industrial piping and emerging back into the open urban environment

entered.detail: tight concrete walls on both sides creating a narrow passage between buildings
exposed utility pipes and conduits running along the ceiling and walls
red illuminated strips and accent lights providing the primary illumination in the dark passage
chain-link or mesh fencing blocking off sections of the alley

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow, dark alleyway with tight walls on both sides and industrial piping overhead. The space is dimly lit primarily by red neon accent lights and features metal security fencing. Walking through the enclosed passage and emerging back into a more open urban area with visible glass buildings and ambient city lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into the expansive neon lights of a city center before descending into a dark urban alley. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway, following another person past large digital billboards and exposed ceiling pipes under fluorescent light. As the camera exits the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection at night, shifting from artificial interior lighting to an open sky dominated by the bright signage of the MARQUESS building and idling traffic. The movement then flows into a modern pedestrian plaza characterized by purple neon glass towers and palm trees, eventually ascending a wide concrete staircase toward an upper level. Finally, the environment tightens as the camera enters a narrow, dimly lit alleyway accented by red neon and metal fencing before emerging once more into the ambient glow of the surrounding glass buildings.
